name: Chicken Pate
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Chicken breast, cooked, minced (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the finely chopped chicken, softened Neufchatel cheese, chopped onion, dry sherry, mayonnaise, lemon juice, hot sauce, and ground nutmeg in a container of an electric blender.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Transfer the mixture to a 2-cup mold coated with cooking spray (Pam).
4. Cover and chill overnight.
5. Unmold onto a serving plate.
6. Sprinkle with paprika.
7. Garnish with parsley sprigs, if desired.
8. Serve with Melba toast rounds or unsalted crackers.
